title: xenophyllum ciliolatum
intro: Xenophyllum ciliolatum, also known as the Mexican snowball or ciliolatum, is a perennial plant species native to Mexico. It belongs to the family Plantaginaceae and is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its ability to alleviate various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, thanks to its bioactive compounds. Xenophyllum ciliolatum is prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its herbal preparations are used to promote overall well-being and to treat specific health concerns.
